overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit commercial district at night. The clip follows a blue-haired character smoking on a sidewalk, transitions through a wide intersection with light trails from traffic, and ends with an approach to an NPC standing by a medical clinic.

events.description: character begins walking forward while smoking cigarette
moving from covered walkway area toward open intersection

agents.ego_description: third-person view following a character with blue hair and red cap who is smoking while walking along a neon-lit sidewalk

notable_agents.action: character with blue hair smoking a cigarette and walking forward

entered.detail: glowing cyan structural column emitting purple and blue light
modern glass shop front with interior neon lighting
large purple neon advertisement sign on distant building
hexagonal patterned sidewalk tiles with wet reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close third-person view of a character with blue hair and a red cap smoking a cigarette while walking along a narrow neon-lit sidewalk. Cyan and purple neon lights illuminate the scene from storefronts and columns, reflecting off the wet hexagonal pavement tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide commercial intersection with digital billboards and traffic

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into wide open street intersection with towering buildings
vehicles pass by creating streaks of light trails from headlights and taillights

agents.ego_description: camera moves past the first character and continues walking down the wide street, showcasing the expansive cityscape with towering skyscrapers and light trails from traffic

entered.detail: towering futuristic building with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
cylindrical building covered in large digital advertisements and neon displays
tall palm trees lining the edge of the street
modern multi-lamp street lights illuminating the intersection
illuminated digital advertisement stand on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in digital billboards. The camera moves through the open space as vehicles create light trails streaking across the wet asphalt, with palm trees visible along the street edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with medical clinic and vending machines

events.description: enters narrower sidewalk area with brick architecture and medical signage
camera slows and circles around the standing character to show different angles

agents.ego_description: camera approaches and circles around a character wearing an orange jacket and pink mask standing against a brick wall near a medical clinic

notable_agents.action: character in orange jacket and pink mask standing idle against the wall with hands at sides

entered.detail: red brick wall with metal security shutters and ventilation pipes
illuminated green neon medical cross sign indicating clinic
yellow and white automated kiosk with glowing interface
green neon sign reading CHILL OUT above a doorway
large blue plastic waste container against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a narrower sidewalk lined with a red brick building featuring a green neon medical cross sign. A character in an orange jacket stands against the wall near a yellow vending machine, and the camera circles around them, revealing a CHILL OUT neon sign and the wet reflective pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched commercial district that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a sprawling urban intersection before settling in a quiet medical alley. It begins with a close view of a blue-haired character in a red cap smoking a cigarette, moving past cyan and purple storefronts that reflect off wet hexagonal pavement. As the path opens, the camera glides into a wide intersection dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and digital billboards, where vehicles leave streaks of light across the asphalt beneath roadside palm trees. The scene then shifts back toward a narrower walkway lined with red brick, drawing closer to a green neon medical cross and a yellow vending machine. Finally, the camera circles around a character in an orange jacket, revealing a glowing CHILL OUT sign against the reflective ground.
